Document:
# DOVE-CLASS EXPEDITION SHUTTLE
[color=#a4885c]Ship Size:[/color] Medium
[color=#a4885c]Recommended Crew:[/color] 2-4
[color=#a4885c]Power Gen Type:[/color] AME*
[color=#a4885c]Expeditions:[/color] Yes
[color=#a4885c]IFF Console:[/color] None
"A versatile, expedition-capable light freighter, with a small armory and medbay."
# Ship Functions
# Notes
*When replacing the DYS Dove's in-built AME, note that the [bold]Target Power[/bold] for the shuttle is [color=#a4885c]41[bold]kW[/bold][/color] baseline. Modifications to the DYS Dove may increase or decrease this.
